title: Compound V and Temp V
description: This mod adds Compound V and Temp V from the tv show "The Boys". This Mod adds two crafting recipes as well as two new custom items.
body:
This Mod adds Compound V and Temp V into Minecraft. There are two new items and 5 other powers.
The Powers include:
Flight/Invisibility/Teleport/Water Breathing/Lazer Vision/ etc.


Requirements

You need minecraft: 1.21.8
Fabric API: 0.133.4+1.21.8
Fabric loader: 0.17.2
